metadata.title: Sallah Tare — Ganuwar Bikin Duniya
metadata.description: Me ya sa za a yi biki kai kaɗai alhali miliyoyi a fadin duniya suna raba wannan lokaci mai albarka? Dare ɗaya, wata ɗaya, biki ɗaya — tare.
metadata.ogDescription: Raba gaisuwar Sallah ɗinka da duniya. Dare ɗaya, wata ɗaya, biki ɗaya — tare.

hero.title: Ku Yi Bikin Sallah
hero.subtitle: Me ya sa za a yi biki kai kaɗai alhali miliyoyi a fadin duniya suna raba wannan lokaci mai albarka? Dare ɗaya, wata ɗaya, biki ɗaya — tare.

countries.label: Ana bikin a fadin duniya · kasashe {count, number}

compose.sectionSubtitle: Gaisuwarka ta hada kai da miliyoyi a duniya yau da dare
compose.title: Gaisuwar Sallah ɗinka
compose.placeholder: Raba albarkar Sallah ɗinka da duniya yau da dare…

feed.heading: Gaisuwa daga Duniya
feed.emptyBody: Be the first to share a Sallah wish.

toast.sendSuccess: Gaisuwarka ta shiga duniya yau da dare!
toast.sendError: An kasa aika gaisuwarka. A sake gwadawa.
